reviews.review_description: I am a piano player for a living and this game sucked, not only were the keys off but they were so inaccurate on tone, I tried playing the song seven years, which is a good song but ended up terrible when I played it
Game is so good but I can’t read the notes on the list but it’s okay I don’t need does but still a w game.(5 stars)
Really good, but one problem, idk how to read sheet music... Can you please make it to where you can enable a setting where the notes fall and you have to play them when they hit

reviews.review_title: Omfg this thing pisses me off.
reviews.review_description: It doesn't track your hands properly and all the keys sound off. I promise you it ain't worth it. I'm over here trying to uninstall this game and I just bought this like a min ago. No wonder why it's free, get this game outta my sight.

On MQ2, swiped fingers across . Does not pick up. Playing two chords at a time also doesn't work. No onboarding makes feel they just slapped together. I hope the devs improve it. Also 88-key option would grand. Pun intended :)

reviews.review_title: I tried, it needs a lot of refinement
reviews.review_description: its quite the idea, but its still lacking finesse and smoothness in interaction.  cant even roll uo and down across the keyboard. At best we can do so far is two index fingers.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your feedback! We hear you. 😊
We’ve just released an update with significantly improved hand-tracking, better instructions, and overall smoother interaction. You should now be able to move more naturally across the keyboard, and the experience should feel much more fluid.

reviews.review_description: Keys are too close together. I can barely play songs. Fix it.
Your game dose not work I try to press the keys and they play a different sound
i learned how to play the piano from youtube
Hand tracking is awful, you can just about play with one finger on each hand as it cant pick out the other fingers accurately enough. There is no instructions or help, deleted afer 10 Mins

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for trying the app and sharing your feedback! 
We’re still in the early stages, and improving hand-tracking accuracy is one of our top priorities. We’re actively working on updates to make multi-finger tracking smoother and more reliable. Instructions and helpful guidance are also coming soon to make the experience easier for everyone.

reviews.review_description: i did not see a piano when i pressed start

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying the app, when you press start please look around you will see the tutorial first, after finishing it you will see the piano.

reviews.review_description: Could barely press any keys simple refine the game

developer_response.body: We’ve released an update with significantly improved hand-tracking, You should now be able to move more naturally across the keyboard.
